name: top
description: 获取 Hacker News 当前最热门文章 (Top Stories). Use this to see what's trending now on HN. For filtering by type (Show HN, Ask HN, etc.), use the dedicated commands: show, ask, jobs, launch. For searching keywords, use search instead.

name: new
description: 获取 Hacker News 最新发布文章 (New Stories). Use this to see the newest submissions on HN. For top stories, use top. For best all-time stories, use best instead.

name: best
description: 获取 Hacker News 历史最佳文章 (Best Stories). Use this to discover all-time best HN posts. For current trending stories, use top. For newest submissions, use new instead.

name: ask
description: 获取 Hacker News 问答讨论 (Ask HN). Use this to find Q&A discussions where users ask the HN community questions. For project showcases, use show. For job postings, use jobs. For product launches, use launch instead.

name: show
description: 获取 Hacker News 项目展示 (Show HN). Use this to find HN users showing off their projects and products. For Q&A discussions, use ask. For job postings, use jobs. For product launches, use launch instead.

name: jobs
description: 获取 Hacker News 招聘信息 (Jobs). Use this to find job opportunities posted on HN. For Q&A discussions, use ask. For project showcases, use show. For product launches, use launch instead.

name: launch
description: 获取 Hacker News 产品发布 (Launch HN). Use this to find newly launched products and projects on HN. For project showcases, use show. For Q&A discussions, use ask. For job postings, use jobs instead.

name: search
description: 在 Hacker News 搜索关键词. Use this to find articles matching specific topics or keywords. Returns results from Algolia HN Search API. For browsing specific categories, use dedicated commands: top, new, best, ask, show, jobs, launch.
